series_title: Agriculture and Forestry Industries Development (AFID) Fund
series_description: This series documents the Secretary's involvement with Agriculture and Forestry Industries Development (AFID) Fund projects. This series may include, but is not limited to: programmatic memoranda, correspondence, press releases, and briefing material.

This series documents the Secretary's involvement with economic development projects, initiatives, and events, as well as interactions with outside agriculture and forestry development organizations, boards, and commissions. This series may include, but is not limited to: correspondence, reports, speeches or remarks, digital and/or analog images, audio/video files, social media content, and promotional material.
